urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Oh Qasim Oh Qasim
Haye qasim haye qasim
Dasht me Ibne Hasan par waqt kaisa aagayaa
english translation text: In the desert of Karbala, the son of Hassan is facing a calamity

Qasim’s body has been gathered in just one piece of cloth,
In the desert of Karbala, the son of Imam Hasan (a.s.) is facing a calamity

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Char kandho par janaza ghar me aata hai magar ek hi kandhe pe ye iska janaza aagayaa
english translation text: A dead body is usually carried on the shoulders of four people, but Qasim’s body was carried on just one shoulder
The way a gardener picks flowers from his garden, In that way, Imam Husain (a.s.) came to gather the pieces of Qasim

After kissing the taweez, Imam cried for a long time
What must he have remembered after reading the letter of his brother?

The wedding procession has come from the battlefield, Fizza said crying,
Pay respects as the groom comes from the battlefield

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Whilst gathering the pieces of Qasim’s body,
The son of Zahra collapsed many times
Lash ko tartib jab de-ne lagaa Zahra ka laal
Baarha maula ki aankho me andheraa aagayaa

@HujjatELC
Therefore Qasim’s body could be recognised
Baap ka tawiz tha be-te ke baazu par bandha
Iss liye pechaan me qasimka lashaa aagayaa
english translation text: The father’s taweez was tied on his son’s arm,
Whenever a wedding takes place in the house of an Azaadar,
